text:
Once again, Kenya topped the continent and ranked 17th globally with 11 medals (four gold, two silver and five bronze) at this year's Paris Olympic Games.This was a fairly improved performance from 2020 Tokyo Games where the nation raked in 10 medals (four gold, four silver and two bronze) and positioned 19th in the world.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: How Kenyan heroes ruled Paris Olympic Games
author: Rodgers Eshitemi in Paris
description: Kenya bagged a total number of 11 medals in Paris, one more than in Tokyo.
keywords: ["Paris Olympic Games","2024 Olympic Games","Faith Kipyegon","Beatrice Chebet"]
